pr-evidence/readme-storage-layout-schema.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found the first governance assertion too loose because it only checked the whole Logical Model section. The test now extracts the fenced manifest table containing `Manifest table:` and asserts `storage_layout` appears immediately after `layout_version`; the final GPT-5.5 pass found no remaining issues.
verification: find src tests -name '*.py' -print0 | xargs -0 python -m py_compile
what_changed: Added storage_layout to the README manifest table next to layout_version.
Added a governance test that extracts the README manifest table fenced block and verifies storage_layout is present in the schema.
Resolved GPT-5.5 review feedback by tightening the test to the actual manifest table block.
pr-evidence/readme-storage-layout-schema.why: Keep user-facing storage schema documentation aligned with persisted PackChunk and ChunkRef metadata so engine adapters can rely on documented storage-layout compatibility checks.
